author: Caio Lopes
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Syntax highlighting for CrowdStrike CQL (LogScale Query Language) in code blocks.

manifest.author: Caio Lopes
manifest.description: Syntax highlighting for CrowdStrike CQL (LogScale Query Language) in code blocks.
manifest.name: Talon CQL

name: Talon CQL

releases.author: clivoa
releases.description:
Maintenance release for Talon CQL.

Changes since 0.1.0:
- Refactors the plugin internals and build imports.
- Enhances CQL highlighting behavior.
- Improves CSS styling and user interaction polish.
- Adds repository screenshot assets for the Obsidian Community page.

Built with npm run build.

releases.author: clivoa
releases.description: Initial release of Talon CQL, an Obsidian plugin that adds syntax highlighting for CrowdStrike CQL (LogScale Query Language) code blocks.
